overview: Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy is an Avanthi Educational Society engineering campus at Gunthapally, near Ramoji Film City in Hayathnagar. Public pages tied to the Avanthi group and Telangana counseling directories describe it as a JNTUH-affiliated Hyderabad engineering college serving the Rangareddy region.
accreditation: AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUH; part of Avanthi Educational Society's Hyderabad campuses.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Civil, CSE, CSE (Data Science), CSE (AI and ML), ECE, EEE, Mechanical

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Current public fee is not clearly published
Current public fee is not clearly published
Current public fee is not clearly published

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions align with Telangana engineering counseling for institute code ASRA, while management and other institutional admissions are routed through the Avanthi group's published channels.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET, TG ECET, TG PGECET, and TG ICET schedules are announced by Telangana authorities each cycle; Avanthi group pages and counseling directories carry institute updates.

campus.specialNote: Official Avanthi group pages list ASRA among the Hyderabad campuses near Ramoji Film City.

contact.address: Gunthapally, Near Ramoji Film City, Hayathnagar, Ranga Reddy District - 501512, Telangana, India
